content.text:
{
  "dimension": "anti-pattern-avoidance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach navigates clear bait without tripping any priority anti-patterns. When the client explicitly asks for a script in turn 9 ('what would I even say to her? ... I just don't know what words to use'), the coach declines the fixing-people bait gracefully in turn 10 by noticing the move toward words and redirecting to the felt sense. No boundary-script advice is given, avoiding the scenario-specific dont-use-boundaries-as-ultimatums trap. The coach does not fight the inner critic, does not evangelize AoA terminology, does not reassure prematurely ('you're not selfish'), does not stack rapid-fire investigative questions, and does not deploy methodology coldly. Turn 8's reframing ('what if wanting less didn't mean either of those things?') is a gentle invitation rather than a push to transform, and the coach immediately follows the client's resistance in turn 9 rather than pressing. Turn 12 ('Yeah. There you go again. What's it like to notice that?') is a textbook avoidance of overwhelm-of-creating-the-overwhelm when the client is self-critical about being self-critical.",
  "evidence_turns": [8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Simple connecting question, no technique-as-performance."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Follows the guilt thread without fixing or reassuring."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Identity-level question; opens rather than directs."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reframe is offered as a possibility, not pushed; no loving-to-transform vigor."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Declines the script-bait gracefully — avoids fixing-people and dont-use-boundaries-as-ultimatums."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "When client self-criticizes the redirect, coach does not pile on or analyze — avoids overwhelm-of-creating-the-overwhelm."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Invites staying with the want before the 'but' — clean move toward state-the-want, no anti-pattern."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["linguistic-caveat", "state-the-want-not-the-action", "the-want"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["does-saying-it-increase-your-love", "what-if-you-acted-exactly-how-you-want", "empowered-vs-power", "view"],
  "notes": "Conversation ends before the love test could be deployed; not a trip, just an incomplete arc. Anti-pattern avoidance remains clean throughout."
}
